code:
﻿stateDiagram-v2
direction LR

[*] --> OrderSubmitted
OrderSubmitted --> PaymentProcessing : ProcessPaymentCommand
PaymentProcessing --> StockReserving : PaymentProcessedEvent
PaymentProcessing --> OrderFailed : PaymentFailedEvent / CancelOrder
PaymentProcessing --> OrderFailed : PaymentTimeoutEvent / CancelPayment + CancelOrder

StockReserving --> ShipmentCreating : StockReservedEvent
StockReserving --> OrderFailed : StockReservationFailedEvent / RefundPayment + CancelOrder
StockReserving --> OrderFailed : StockTimeoutEvent / CancelOrder

ShipmentCreating --> OrderCompleted : ShipmentCreatedEvent / OrderCompletedEvent
ShipmentCreating --> OrderFailed : ShipmentFailedEvent / ReleaseStock + RefundPayment + CancelOrder

OrderCompleted --> [*]
OrderFailed --> [*]

note right of PaymentProcessing
  Timeout: 5 min
  Reintentos: exponencial (1s..5m)
end note

note right of StockReserving
  Timeout: 2 min
  Compensación si falla:
  - RefundPayment
  - CancelOrder
end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个订单状态流转图，核心是从下单到最终完成或失败的全流程。起点应该是OrderSubmitted，然后进入PaymentProcessing支付处理状态。
支付处理之后呢？是直接进入发货环节还是有中间状态？另外支付失败的话怎么处理？
支付成功后通过PaymentProcessedEvent进入StockReserving库存预留状态。但支付可能失败，要有PaymentFailedEvent和PaymentTimeoutEvent两种情况，都走到OrderFailed终态，超时的话还要CancelPayment。
好的，我先把支付相关的分支加上。另外支付处理这个节点需要标注超时策略吗？
对，PaymentProcessing右边加注释：超时5分钟，重试策略是指数退避，从1秒到5分钟。然后库存预留成功后走StockReservedEvent到ShipmentCreating发货创建状态。
库存预留如果失败或者超时呢？是不是也要取消订单？
没错，StockReservationFailedEvent和StockTimeoutEvent都到OrderFailed。预留失败要先RefundPayment退款再CancelOrder，超时直接CancelOrder。StockReserving的注释写上超时2分钟，补偿动作包括RefundPayment和CancelOrder。
发货创建环节怎么设计？成功和失败分别到哪里？
ShipmentCreating成功的话ShipmentCreatedEvent触发，同时发OrderCompletedEvent，进入OrderCompleted终态。失败的话ShipmentFailedEvent要走ReleaseStock释放库存、RefundPayment退款、CancelOrder取消订单，然后到OrderFailed。
明白了，两个终态OrderCompleted和OrderFailed都回到结束节点。整个图方向从左到右，我检查一下：支付5分钟超时指数退避，库存2分钟超时，所有失败路径的补偿动作都齐了。
